reviews.comment:
Buena atencion del Perdonal! , pero NO HACEN FACTURA A, con la aplicación de Ypf....es LEY,no pueden NEGAR FACTURA  y sino modifiquen la aplicacion. Ya que los playeros no pueden hacer nada...

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very helpful! However, they don't issue invoices (type A) with the YPF app...it's the law, they can't refuse to issue invoices, and if they can't, they need to modify the app. The gas station attendants can't do anything about it...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5LWZQU2VnEAE
